topAlert.title: OneUptime Admin Dashboard
topAlert.description: You can perform your OneUptime server related tasks on this dashboard.

users.title: Users
users.cardDescription: Here is a list of users in OneUptime.

userView.title: User
userView.masterAdminCardDescription: Grant or revoke master admin access for this user. Master admins can manage every project and workspace.

projects.title: Projects
projects.cardDescription: Here is a list of projects in OneUptime.

projectUsers.title: Project Users
projectUsers.cardDescription: Here is a list of all the users in this project.
projectUsers.noItems: No users found in this project.
projectUsers.inviteUserDescription: Invite a new user to this project.

projectUserView.title: Project User
projectUserView.cardDescription: User details and team memberships in this project.
projectUserView.teamsCardDescription: Teams this user belongs to in this project.
projectUserView.teamsNoItems: This user is not a member of any team in this project.

projectTeams.title: Project Teams
projectTeams.cardDescription: Here is a list of all the teams in this project.
projectTeams.noItems: No teams found in this project.

projectTeamView.title: Project Team
projectTeamView.membersCardDescription: Manage members of this team. Invite new users by email.
projectTeamView.membersNoItems: No members in this team yet.

sendEmail.title: Send Announcement Email
sendEmail.testCardDescription: Send a test announcement email to a single email address to preview how it looks before sending to all users.
sendEmail.allCardDescription: Send an announcement email to all registered users. Please send a test email first to verify the content.
sendEmail.testSuccess: Test email sent successfully. Please check your inbox.
sendEmail.allSuccess: Broadcast email job has been started. Emails will be sent in the background.
sendEmail.confirmDescription: Are you sure you want to send this announcement email to all registered users? This action cannot be undone.

moreEmail.title: Send Announcement Email
moreEmail.cardDescription: Compose an announcement email to send to all registered users. You can send a test email first to preview how it looks.
moreEmail.fillSubjectMessage: Please fill in subject and message before sending a test.
moreEmail.testModalDescription: Enter an email address to send a test of this announcement.
moreEmail.testModalMissingEmail: Please enter a test email address.
moreEmail.testSuccess: Test email sent successfully. Please check your inbox.
moreEmail.allSuccess: Broadcast email job has been started. Emails will be sent in the background.
moreEmail.confirmDescription: Are you sure you want to send this announcement email to all registered users? This action cannot be undone.

authentication.authCardDescription: Authentication Settings for this OneUptime Server instance.
authentication.projectCreationCardDescription: Control who can create new projects on this OneUptime Server.

email.adminNotificationCardDescription: Enter the email address where you would like to receive admin-level notifications.
email.serverCardDescription: Pick which email server you would like to use to send emails.
email.smtpCardDescription: Please configure your SMTP server here to send emails.
email.sendgridCardDescription: Enter your Sendgrid API key to send emails through Sendgrid.
email.pillNoApiKey: Not Enabled. Please add the API key.
email.pillNoFromEmail: Not Enabled. Please add the From Email.
email.pillNoFromName: Not Enabled. Please add the From Name.

callSms.cardDescription: This will be used to make Call and send SMS.

whatsapp.metaCardDescription: Configure Meta WhatsApp credentials. These values are used to send WhatsApp notifications from OneUptime.
whatsapp.testCardDescription: Send a test WhatsApp template message to confirm your Meta configuration.
whatsapp.testSuccess: Test WhatsApp message sent successfully. Check the recipient device to confirm delivery.
whatsapp.testMissingNumber: Please enter a WhatsApp number before sending a test message.
whatsapp.testFailure: Failed to send test WhatsApp message.
whatsapp.setupCardDescription: Steps to connect Meta WhatsApp and the templates you must provision.

telegram.setupCardDescription: Read this first — it's the quickest path from zero to a working Telegram bot hooked up to OneUptime.
telegram.configCardDescription: Paste the bot token and username @BotFather gave you. These power outbound notifications; the secret token guards the incoming webhook.
telegram.testCardDescription: Send a test Telegram message to confirm your bot configuration.
telegram.testSuccess: Test Telegram message sent successfully. Check the recipient device to confirm delivery.
telegram.testMissingChatId: Please enter a Telegram chat ID before sending a test message.
telegram.testFailure: Failed to send test Telegram message.

probes.bannerTitle: Need help with setting up Global Probes?
probes.bannerDescription: Here is a guide which will help you get set up
probes.cardDescription: Global Probes help you monitor external resources from different locations around the world.
probes.keyModalDescription: Here is your probe key. Please keep this a secret.

aiAgents.bannerTitle: Need help with setting up Global AI Agents?
aiAgents.bannerDescription: Here is a guide which will help you get set up
aiAgents.cardDescription: Global AI Agents help you automate incident management with AI-powered responses from different locations around the world.
aiAgents.keyModalDescription: Here is your AI agent key. Please keep this a secret.

dataRetention.logCardDescription: Configure how long monitor logs are retained before being automatically deleted.
dataRetention.metricCardDescription: Configure how long monitor metrics are retained before being automatically deleted.

apiKey.cardDescription: This API key has root access to all the resources in all the projects on OneUptime.

llmProviders.bannerTitle: Need help with setting up LLM Providers?
llmProviders.bannerDescription: LLM Providers enable AI features. You can configure global LLM Providers that are available to all projects.
llmProviders.cardDescription: Global LLM Providers are available to all projects for AI features. Configure OpenAI, Azure OpenAI, Anthropic, Groq, Mistral, Ollama, or other LLM providers.
llmProviders.noItems: No LLM Providers configured. Add an LLM Provider to enable AI features.

Any strong random string. OneUptime reje: Any strong random string. OneUptime rejects webhook calls whose X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token header does not match this value.
Application (Client) ID from your Azure: Application (Client) ID from your Azure AD app registration (or service account for JWT Bearer).
Authentication, notifications, probes, A: Authentication, notifications, probes, AI, data retention and more.
Cost per million tokens in USD cents. Fo: Cost per million tokens in USD cents. For example, if the cost is $0.01 per 1M tokens, enter 1.
Disk and memory utilization of the datab: Disk and memory utilization of the databases backing this instance.
Email used to log in to this SMTP Server: Email used to log in to this SMTP Server. This is also the email your customers will see.
Enable or disable the master API key. If: Enable or disable the master API key. If disabled, all requests using this key will fail.
Enable to give this user full access to: Enable to give this user full access to the entire platform.
Enter the email of the user you would li: Enter the email of the user you would like to invite. We will send them an email letting them know they have been invited to the team you selected.
Enter the email of the user you would like to invite. We will send them an email letting them know they have been invited to this team.
Enter the full international phone numbe: Enter the full international phone number (including country code) that should receive the test message.
For Client Credentials: Client secret fr: For Client Credentials: Client secret from your OAuth application. For JWT Bearer (Google): The entire private_key from your service account JSON file (including BEGIN/END markers).
For OAuth, this should be the email addr: For OAuth, this should be the email address you want to send from.
How OneUptime delivers mail using the gl: How OneUptime delivers mail using the global SMTP config. Choose 'SMTP' for most servers. Choose 'Microsoft Graph' if your Microsoft 365 tenant has SMTP AUTH disabled — Graph uses the Mail.Send application permission and bypasses SMTP entirely.
If you have a coupon code, enter it here: If you have a coupon code, enter it here.
If you have bought more phone numbers fr: If you have bought more phone numbers from Twilio for specific countries, you can add them here.
If you use port 465, please enable this. Do not enable this if you use port 587.
Job backlog across the queue workers. A: Job backlog across the queue workers. A growing backlog or failures indicate workers are unhealthy.
Live status, datastore capacity and queu: Live status, datastore capacity and queue backlogs.
Long-lived access token generated in the: Long-lived access token generated in the Meta WhatsApp Business Platform.
Manage all users across the instance.
Name: Name
No global probes have been configured.
Number of days to retain monitor logs. M: Number of days to retain monitor logs. Monitor logs older than this will be automatically deleted.
Number of days to retain monitor logs. Monitor logs older than this will be automatically deleted. Default is 1 day if not set. Minimum: 1 day, Maximum: 365 days.
Number of days to retain monitor metrics: Number of days to retain monitor metrics. Monitor metrics older than this will be automatically deleted.
Number of days to retain monitor metrics. Monitor metrics older than this will be automatically deleted. Default is 1 day if not set. Minimum: 1 day, Maximum: 365 days.
Operational health of this OneUptime ins: Operational health of this OneUptime instance.
Optional Business Account ID that owns t: Optional Business Account ID that owns the WhatsApp templates.
Optional Facebook App ID tied to your Wh: Optional Facebook App ID tied to your WhatsApp integration.
Optional Facebook App Secret used for we: Optional Facebook App Secret used for webhook signature verification.
Please create a new OneUptime project to: Please create a new OneUptime project to get started.
Probes that run monitoring checks for th: Probes that run monitoring checks for this instance, and whether they are currently reporting in.
Report an issue or request a feature on: Report an issue or request a feature on GitHub.
Required for OpenAI, Azure OpenAI, Anthr: Required for OpenAI, Azure OpenAI, Anthropic, Groq, and Mistral. Not required for Ollama if self-hosted.
Required for Username and Password authe: Required for Username and Password authentication. Not used for OAuth.
Restrict Project Creation to Admins Only: Restrict Project Creation to Admins Only
Secret token configured in Meta to valid: Secret token configured in Meta to validate webhook subscription requests.
Select the authentication method. Use OA: Select the authentication method. Use OAuth for providers like Microsoft 365, Google Workspace, etc.
Select the OAuth grant type. Use 'Client: Select the OAuth grant type. Use 'Client Credentials' for Microsoft 365 and most providers. Use 'JWT Bearer' for Google Workspace service accounts.
Select the team you would like to add th: Select the team you would like to add this user to.
Send a broadcast email to all users.
Should we disable sign up of new users t: Should we disable sign up of new users to OneUptime?
SMTP server hostname. Examples: smtp.off: SMTP server hostname. Examples: smtp.office365.com (Microsoft 365), smtp.gmail.com (Google)
Status of the core datastores this OneUp: Status of the core datastores this OneUptime instance depends on.
Subject: Subject
The body of the announcement email. This: The body of the announcement email. This will be displayed in a branded OneUptime email template. You can use Markdown formatting.
The body of the announcement email. This will be sent to all registered users. You can use Markdown formatting.
The bot token @BotFather sent you — star: The bot token @BotFather sent you — starts with digits, then a colon, then ~35 letters/digits. Not a URL, not a curl command.
The email address where the test email w: The email address where the test email will be sent.
The numeric chat ID of the recipient. A: The numeric chat ID of the recipient. A user can get their own chat ID by sending any message to @userinfobot on Telegram.
The specific model or deployment name to: The specific model or deployment name to use (e.g., gpt-4o for OpenAI, your deployment name for Azure OpenAI, llama-3.3-70b-versatile for Groq, mistral-large-latest for Mistral).
The subject line of the announcement ema: The subject line of the announcement email.
The WhatsApp Business phone number ID as: The WhatsApp Business phone number ID associated with your sending number.
This AI agent handles automated incident: This AI agent handles automated incident management.
This API key has root access to all the: This API key has root access to all the resources in all the projects on OneUptime.
This is the display name your team and c: This is the display name your team and customers see, when they receive emails from OneUptime.
This probe is to monitor all the interna: This probe is to monitor all the internal services.
User not found in this project.
When enabled, only master admin users ca: When enabled, only master admin users can create new projects.
Who would you like the owner of this pro: Who would you like the owner of this project to be? If you leave this blank - you will be the owner of the project
You can find this in your Twilio console: You can find this in your Twilio console.
Your bot's Telegram username, without th: Your bot's Telegram username, without the leading @. Telegram usernames end in 'bot'.
Postgres, ClickHouse, Redis and queue he: Postgres, ClickHouse, Redis and queue health at a glance.
Projects, users, monitors and incidents: Projects, users, monitors and incidents across the instance.
Spot job backlogs and failures before th: Spot job backlogs and failures before they cause incidents.
Track database disk and memory utilizati: Track database disk and memory utilization before you run out.
